prompt.text: Answer with exactly the WGSL scalar type name for a 32-bit floating-point value.

boundaryComparison.comparisonMode: F16 slice diagnostics first-token prefix versus Q4 slice diagnostics full timeline

firstMaterialDifference.definition: first sampled boundary with maxAbsDiff greater than 0.001

captureModeControl.interpretation: Use diagnostic-versus-diagnostic boundaries for localization. Do not treat microscopic exact differences as the root cause without a same-mode replay control.

boundaryComparison.conclusion: The first material F16-versus-Q4 change occurs at the first layer-0 feed-forward projection backed by a Q4_K_M weight. This localizes the next diagnostic boundary but does not distinguish expected quantization loss from incorrect Q4_K scale/min decoding or materialization.

hypotheses.recurrentProjectionMaterialization: not supported as the first material boundary because the recurrent projection weights are F16 and only microscopic drift precedes the feed-forward gate

exactCommands: node tools/inspect-prefill-logits.js --model-dir ../../rdrr/qwen-3-5-9b-f16-af32 --prompt 'Answer with exactly the WGSL scalar type name for a 32-bit floating-point value.' --runtime-profile profiles/qwen-3-5-9b-metal-correctness --max-tokens 16 --top-k 20 --watch-token 248046 --watch-token 248044 --watch-token 63 --watch-token 69 --watch-token 18 --watch-token 17 --logits-out reports/qwen-3-5-9b-metal/2026-07-12/f16-base-first-token-logits.f32 --out reports/qwen-3-5-9b-metal/2026-07-12/f16-base-first-token.json

node tools/inspect-prefill-logits.js --model-dir ../../rdrr/qwen-3-5-9b-f16-af32 --prompt 'Answer with exactly the WGSL scalar type name for a 32-bit floating-point value.' --runtime-profile profiles/qwen-3-5-9b-metal-correctness --max-tokens 16 --top-k 20 --watch-token 248046 --watch-token 248044 --watch-token 63 --watch-token 69 --watch-token 18 --watch-token 17 --diagnostics-level slice --logits-out reports/qwen-3-5-9b-metal/2026-07-12/f16-boundaries-logits.f32 --out reports/qwen-3-5-9b-metal/2026-07-12/f16-boundaries.json

node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import { findFirstDivergence } from './src/inference/pipelines/text/operator-events.js'; import { getDriftTolerance } from './src/inference/pipelines/text/drift-policy.js'; const f=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('reports/qwen-3-5-9b-metal/2026-07-12/f16-boundaries.json')); const q=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('reports/qwen-3-5-9b-metal/2026-07-12/q4-boundaries.json')); const baseline=f.generation.operatorDiagnostics.timeline.slice(0,q.generation.operatorDiagnostics.recordCount); const observed=q.generation.operatorDiagnostics.timeline; const result=findFirstDivergence(baseline,observed,getDriftTolerance); console.log(JSON.stringify(result,null,2));"
nextDiagnostic: Compare the layer.0.ffn.gate Q4_K_M projection against a trusted dequantized/reference calculation using identical layer.0.ffn.in values before changing runtime code.

claimBoundary.trainingImprovement: Not evaluated or rerun; the frozen V12 AMD/ROCm matrix was not touched.
claimBoundary.baseModelInferenceCorrectness: The exact F16 control is coherent on M3 Metal. The exact mixed-Q4 candidate is not coherent and first stops at <|im_end|>.
claimBoundary.adapterInferenceCorrectness: Not evaluated; correctly gated on coherent base-Q4 inference.
claimBoundary.runtimePerformance: Not measured or claimed. Timing fields in raw receipts are operational metadata only.
